ksa_text: Ability to develop measurement strategies, metrics, and monitoring procedures that track organizational risk status, exposure, and management effectiveness.

dcwf.top_element_label: Conduct independent in-depth target and technical analysis including target-specific information (e.g., cultural, organizational, political) that results in access.

top_anchors.element_label: Conduct independent in-depth target and technical analysis including target-specific information (e.g., cultural, organizational, political) that results in access.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-A-002 (RM, Ability) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.3839 is insufficient to establish relevance to senior-level analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (dcwf=0.384, ddat=0.380, nice=0.369) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.3839 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RM-domain KSA RM-A-002 (composite 0.3839) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RM domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per COSO ERM framework; risk competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data risk identification, not enterprise risk management. Composite 0.3839 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RM domain KSA at composite 0.3839 is not a standard requirement for Senior Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3839, domain RM, scope weak fit. High confidence.
